intro.title: OEM & ODM Process
intro.description: Your biggest risk is not the first sample - it is what happens after. Our process protects you from silent changes, unclear decisions, and quality drift between sample and mass production.

steps.title: Requirements & Market Alignment
steps.description: Confirm destination market, sales channel, compliance needs, target price, and customer expectations to prevent redesign loops.

steps.title: DFM Review & Prototyping
steps.description: Propose structure and BOM direction, then build prototypes to validate fit, finish, and user experience.

steps.title: Testing & Validation
steps.description: Validate performance factors that drive returns: read performance, drop stability, repeated use cycles, and packaging protection.

steps.title: Mass Production with Checkpoints
steps.description: Incoming checks, in-process inspection, and final functional testing with aligned inspection standards.

steps.title: Delivery & Repeat-Order Support
steps.description: Export packing, carton marking, shipping coordination, and revision control for repeat orders.

rfqChecklist.title: RFQ Checklist (What We Need)
items: Target market (EU/US/UK) and required labels or marks

primary.title: Request a Quote
primary.description: Tell us your target market, quantity, and customization needs. We respond within 24 hours with a practical quote and clear next steps.

secondary.title: Ask for a Prototype Timeline
secondary.description: Share your reference product and timeline. We will propose the fastest path from sample to stable mass production.
